project: Hotel Management Platform - Admin Checkout & Room Status
description: Admin early checkout functionality with automatic room status management

userStories.title: Admin early checkout with auto room status update
userStories.description: Allow admin to checkout guests early and automatically set room status to cleaning/maintenance
acceptanceCriteria: Admin can view active bookings at /admin/bookings
Early checkout button on active bookings with status='checked_in'
On checkout: update booking status to 'checked_out', set checkout date to now
Auto-update room status to 'cleaning' after checkout
Create BookingLog entry for early checkout action
Verify admin can checkout guest and room status changes automatically
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed: Early checkout functionality implemented with automatic room status update to 'cleaning'

userStories.title: Admin room status management (cleaning to available)
userStories.description: Admin can update room status from cleaning/maintenance to available for rebooking
acceptanceCriteria: Room status enum includes: available, occupied, cleaning, maintenance
Admin rooms page shows current room status with visual indicator
Quick action button to mark room as 'available' when status is cleaning/maintenance
Room becomes bookable only when status is 'available'
Booking flow checks room.status before allowing reservation
Verify room status workflow: occupied -> cleaning -> available
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Completed: Room status management implemented with quick action to mark rooms as available
